title: Magically Gooey Peruvian Sweet Red Peppers Tacu Tacu
description: A nostalgic Peruvian dish featuring sweet red peppers in a tacu tacu form, served in a Korean brass bowl, perfect for a dairy-free friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium heat and grill the sweet red peppers for 10 minutes on each side until the skin is charred and blistered.
Peel the skin off the peppers and chop them into small pieces.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat and saute the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the cooked rice, beans, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the chopped peppers to the skillet and stir to combine.
Using a spatula, shape the mixture into a tacu tacu form.
Transfer the tacu tacu to a Korean brass bowl and serve immediately.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro or scallions if desired.
